en.title: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 15

blocks.value: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 15
What’s on the roadmap for July/Q3 for DIGITALAX?

Gosh, 2021 has moved lightning fast. The past 6 months has seen large structural changes in not only the broader crypto, NFT and DeFi markets, but also very much so within DIGITALAX— our roadmap thus far has been jam packed with new deployments, integrations and strengthening across every fundamental aspect of our ecosystem; from fashion, gaming and commerce, to the decentralised infrastructure that we build and centre our entire economy upon; technology and values inclusive.

Since launch, the ecosystem has grown and scaled out as expected, and our next big update will be announced at the start of this coming week. This next move is specifically around furthering the utility, liquidity and interoperability of our token, operations, products and ecosystem beyond how it is recognised today. The strategy we take is a deliberate approach on many levels simultaneously, in order to support the long term growth of the ecosystem and continue the opening of the playing field for more compounding progress to come.
How does anyone join the Global Designer Network?

We recently expanded our Global Designer Network to include hundreds of highly skilled digital and physical fashion designers that are passionate and aligned with our mission for building out the fabric of web3 fashion and everything that this entails; from gaming, esports, NFTs, DeFi, crypto, DAOs, open source etc. etc.

This network is being crafted into a real DAO. We have a dedicated Global Designer Network discord, where the community is growing and collaborating— from our weekly designer calls to other news and updates collectively being actioned.
The first bigger designer network update is being announced this coming week and it is pretty exciting!
If you are a designer, creator, metaverse dweller… anyone that has a desire to be part of this movement and aligns strongly with our mission please reach out on any of our socials to get involved!
The dedicated Global Designer Network socials to stay up to date on include;

This announcement is interesting to say the least. Worldcoin is a newly launched project establishing a globally distributed crypto UBI that intends to prove the unique “human-ness” of each recipient through their eye scanning device— collecting sensitive biometric data and converting this into numerical identifiers.

It’s certainly a different approach that is being taken to ensure the legitimacy of users than other live UBI-crypto hybrids, like that of Kleros and Proof of Humanity. However, the primary controversy comes when acknowledging the privacy implications. Biometric data is extremely sensitive and as of yet Worldcoin hasn’t provided confidence and assurance on how exactly they are planning to properly protect users against these vulnerabilities. Moreover, with high profile web2 investor names backing the project, strong questions are being raised about the adherence to decentralisation, where it appears that although the project might be “building on blockchain”, these principles aren’t being effectively cascaded to the parts of the project where it really matters; power and value control.

We’ve seen a fair share of unique community/club membership style NFT drops the past few weeks; from the popular Bored Ape Yacht Club to other less media exposed projects. And, one project out of these certainly deserves a shoutout. But not for quite the reasons that you’d expect. We won’t comment on the fundamentals, team, philosophy, expected successful (or not) projection of this project…because, tbh, we don’t really know much about it/them.

But, what we can say is that their marketing and communications is perpetually persistent in ensuring that the broader NFT discord communities stay up to date across all of their significant minting events. Shoutout to mmtiglioglu from the United Punks Union project for giving the DIGITALAX discord community over 28 updates in the past 14 days. You are certainly ensuring that we stay in the loop 😆 . You know what they say… “Energy and persistence conquer all things.” — Benjamin Franklin.
If you would like a question answered or contribute content to next weeks article please reach out through our DIGITALAX discord server in #FUD-FAQ channel!

ar.title: FUD FAQ | ثريد مجتمعي اسبوعي | اسبوع 15

blocks.value: FUD FAQ | ثريد مجتمعي اسبوعي | اسبوع 15
What’s على ال roadmap لـ July/Q3 لـ DIGITALAX?

Gosh, 2021 has moved lightning fast. ال past 6 months has seen large structural changes في not only ال broader crypto, NFT و DeFi markets, but also very much so within DIGITALAX— our roadmap thus far has been jam packed مع جديد deployments, integrations و strengthening across every fundamental aspect من our النظام; من فاشون, gaming و commerce, الى ال decentralised infrastructure that we build و centre our entire economy upon; technology و values inclusive.

Since launch, ال النظام has grown و scaled out as expected, و our next big تحديث will be announced at ال start من this coming اسبوع. This next move is specifically around furthering ال utility, liquidity و interoperability من our token, operations, products و النظام beyond ازاي it is recognised today. ال strategy we take is a deliberate approach على many levels simultaneously, في order الى support ال long term growth من ال النظام و continue ال opening من ال playing field لـ more compounding progress الى come.
ازاي does anyone join ال Global Designer Network?

We recently expanded our Global Designer Network الى include hundreds من highly skilled ديجيتال و physical فاشون designers that are passionate و aligned مع our mission لـ building out ال fabric من web3 فاشون و everything that this entails; من gaming, esports, NFTs, DeFi, crypto, DAOs, open source etc. etc.

This network is being crafted into a real DAO. We have a dedicated Global Designer Network discord, where ال المجتمع is growing و collaborating— من our weekly designer calls الى other news و تحديثات collectively being actioned.
ال first bigger designer network تحديث is being announced this coming اسبوع و it is pretty exciting!
If you are a designer, creator, metaverse dweller… anyone that has a desire الى be part من this movement و aligns strongly مع our mission please reach out على any من our socials الى get involved!
ال dedicated Global Designer Network socials الى stay up الى تاريخ على include;

This announcement is interesting الى say ال least. Worldcoin is a newly launched project establishing a globally distributed crypto UBI that intends الى prove ال unique “human-ness” من each recipient through their eye scanning device— collecting sensitive biometric data و converting this into numerical identifiers.

It’s certainly a different approach that is being taken الى ensure ال legitimacy من users than other live UBI-crypto hybrids, like that من Kleros و Proof من Humanity. However, ال primary controversy comes when acknowledging ال privacy implications. Biometric data is extremely sensitive و as من yet Worldcoin hasn’t provided confidence و assurance على ازاي exactly they are planning الى properly protect users against these vulnerabilities. Moreover, مع high بروفايل web2 investor names backing ال project, strong اسئلة are being raised about ال adherence الى decentralisation, where it appears that although ال project might be “building على blockchain”, these principles aren’t being effectively cascaded الى ال parts من ال project where it really matters; power و value control.

We’ve seen a fair share من unique المجتمع/club membership style NFT drops ال past few weeks; من ال popular Bored Ape Yacht Club الى other less media exposed projects. و, one project out من these certainly deserves a shoutout. But not لـ quite ال reasons that you’d expect. We won’t comment على ال fundamentals, team, philosophy, expected successful (or not) projection من this project…because, tbh, we don’t really know much about it/them.

But, what we can say is that their marketing و communications is perpetually persistent في ensuring that ال broader NFT discord communities stay up الى تاريخ across all من their significant minting events. Shoutout الى mmtiglioglu من ال United Punks Union project لـ giving ال DIGITALAX discord المجتمع over 28 تحديثات في ال past 14 days. You are certainly ensuring that we stay في ال loop 😆 . You know what they say… “Energy و persistence conquer all things.” — Benjamin Franklin.
If you would like a سؤال answered or contribute content الى next weeks article please reach out through our DIGITALAX discord server في #FUD-FAQ channel!
